specs.title: cp-000: Journal empty state rounded-xl border border-dashed border-border-subtle px-4 py
cp-001: Subscribe checks both journalisSubscribed property AND URL match against current
cp-002: subscribedUrls computed via useMemo from subscriptions array
cp-003: Suggested feeds hidden when search is active hasSearch datasuggestedFeeds
cp-004: Browse feeds exclude suggested in browse mode feedsfilterfeed feedisSuggested
cp-005: PubMed create feed uses trimmedSearch not raw search as query
cp-006: PubMed success message green text text-xs text-green-500
cp-007: PubMed error message red text text-xs text-red-400
cp-008: showAdvancedFilters state boolean default false
cp-009: loadSubscriptions clears error at start isLoadingSubscriptions true error null
cp-010: loadSubscriptions fetches from GET apifeeds endpoint
cp-011: loadSubscriptions error message from Error instance or fallback Failed to load s
cp-012: loadArticles always sends sortDir parameter even for default desc
cp-013: loadArticles only sends sortBy when NOT newest omits for default to reduce param
cp-014: loadArticles sends isReadfalse for unread filter isStarredtrue for starred filte
cp-015: subscribe POSTs to apifeeds with feedUrl body
cp-016: subscribe re-throws error after setting store error enables caller catch
cp-017: subscribePubMed POSTs to apifeeds with pubmedQuery query body
cp-018: subscribePubMed re-throws error after setting store error
cp-019: markRead is fire-and-forget synchronous optimistic update fetchcatchrevert
cp-020: markRead skips if article already read if article articleisRead return
cp-021: markRead POSTs to apifeedsarticlesarticleIdread
cp-022: toggleStar POSTs to apifeedsarticlesarticleIdstar
cp-023: saveToLibrary POSTs to apifeedsarticlesarticleIdsave
cp-024: markAllRead POSTs to apifeedsarticlesmark-all-read with optional feedSourceId
cp-025: markAllRead on success calls loadSubscriptions to refresh unread counts
cp-026: loadArticleNote GETs apifeedsarticlesarticleIdnotes
cp-027: loadArticleNote silently returns on non-ok response no error set
cp-028: loadArticleNote stores empty notes by deleting key from articleNotes map
cp-029: saveArticleNote trims notes before storingsending
cp-030: saveArticleNote sends null to API for empty notes notes trimmedNotes null
cp-031: saveArticleNote failure is silent catch block empty
cp-032: setLayout does NOT trigger article reload only updates layout state
cp-033: clearFilters does NOT reset searchQuery only date and journal
cp-034: loadJournals fetches from GET apifeedsarticlesjournals
